title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Deloitte India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Deloitte India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Deloitte India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Risk Analyst to join our dynamic team in Meerut. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Deloitte India:
Deloitte India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Income Tax

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Deloitte India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
